name: Archivist Salenne
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, mage archivist with ink and chalk on fingers, scrolls and lanterns, tired sharp eyes, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: The enemy believes dawn makes them brave. Dawn only makes them visible.

nodes.text:
Their signals are a language. If you stole their grammar, you can lie in it.

If you bring me the crystal ball later, I can see what the enemy hides behind smoke.
